markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the OKONKWO vs Krall professional tennis match in the 2026 M25 Dallas TX Round of 32 after a ball has been played. markets.title: Will Oliver OKONKWO win the OKONKWO vs Krall: M25 Dallas TX Round of 32 match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If James Wood records 3+ hits in the Houston vs Washington professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026 at 6:45 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If James Wood is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If James Wood starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If James Wood is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If James Wood is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: James Wood: 3+ hits?
